name: First American Title Insurance Company
description_short: First American Title provides title insurance and escrow settlement services for real estate transactions across Denver and beyond, serving as one of the nation's largest title insurance companies.
description_long:
First American Title is part of the First American family, a major title insurance company that has operated for over 130 years. The company has evolved significantly over its long history and continues to adapt to modern real estate transaction needs. The Denver Downtown office, located at 1899 Wynkoop Street in Denver, CO, represents one of their local service centers serving the Colorado market.

The company offers comprehensive title insurance protection and professional settlement services designed to facilitate efficient real estate transfers. Their service portfolio includes title insurance policies, escrow settlement services, 1031 exchange assistance, new agent resources, and homebuyer/seller educational materials. They provide innovative transaction tools including FirstAm IgniteRE, Eagle Homebook customizable marketing materials, and remote online notarization (RON) capabilities for modern closing experiences. The company also offers market research through the ALTOS Market Report system, providing clients with median list prices, inventory data, and days-on-market analytics.

First American Title distinguishes itself through significant workplace recognition, including ranking #51 on Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For in 2024 (10 consecutive years), #90 in Fortune Best Workplaces for Women, and #15 in Financial Services & Insurance rankings. The company maintains a professional team structure with dedicated sales executives, escrow officers, and management staff. They provide business hours Monday-Friday 8:00am-5:00pm and offer multiple contact channels including phone (303.334.2186), fax, and email support.

First American Title is best suited for real estate professionals, homebuyers, and sellers seeking established, full-service title and settlement support from a nationally recognized firm. However, this is a B2B/professional service provider rather than a direct consumer lending platform, and the website provides limited information about pricing, specific loan products, or consumer-specific financing options that might typically appear in mortgage lender profiles.
address: 1975 Research Pkwy Suite 150, Colorado Springs, CO 80920

company_info.headquarters: 1975 Research Pkwy Suite 150, Colorado Springs, CO 80920

pros: Part of Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For (#51 in 2024, 10 consecutive years)
Over 130 years of operational history and evolution in real estate services
Offers remote online notarization (RON) for modern, convenient closing experiences
Provides free ALTOS market research reports with median prices, inventory, and days-on-market data
Comprehensive suite including title insurance, escrow services, 1031 exchanges, and agent resources
Professional team with dedicated escrow officers, sales executives, and management support
Eagle Homebook customizable marketing tool available in digital or print formats
Multiple Fortune workplace awards across diversity, financial services, and culture categories
cons: Website lacks transparent pricing information for title insurance or settlement services
No consumer-facing mortgage lending products or financing terms displayed
Limited information about specific insurance policy coverage details or exclusions
Service appears primarily designed for real estate professionals rather than direct consumers
No FAQ section addressing common consumer questions about title insurance or closing costs
best_for: Real estate agents and brokers seeking professional title and settlement support
Homebuyers and sellers in the Denver/Colorado area needing title insurance and closing services
Professionals seeking market research and transaction analytics for business decisions
diagnosis: First American Title is best for real estate professionals and consumers in Colorado seeking established, full-service title insurance and settlement services from a nationally recognized firm with strong workplace credentials. The primary caveat is that this is a professional B2B service provider, not a direct consumer mortgage lender, so consumers seeking mortgage financing, rates, or loan products should contact traditional mortgage lenders separately.
services: ALTOS Market Report (localized weekly market research)
Real estate glossary and multicultural resources
Earnest money deposit processing via ZOCCAM
